text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Daiwa Scarlet and Air Groove talking on
the track.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How was my form, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
At first glance, your running looks well-balanced.
But on the other hand, it's so curated that it lacks
specialization.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Specialization?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: How should I put this... There was no you in that run. Like you weren't playing to your strengths.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Please tell me! What do you think my strengths
are?
choice_data_list: I'd also like to hear your opinion, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Don't scare me like that, Trainer! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's impolite to interject yourself into
someone else's conversation. However, given
your passion as a trainer, I'll forgive you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: P-passion?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now, Scarlet. When I see you running with Vodka,
I see more of your self shine through than I did
just now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You have the drive to always be a step ahead of
your opponent, and the courage to take up every
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...That's all I can tell you two. It's up to you to
decide what to do with the information.
choice_data_list: Thanks. We'll keep it in mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Think on it hard. For her sake.
choice_data_list: All right! Let's discuss our training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: R-right! Let's get started, Trainer! ♪
choice_data_list: Let's start with the dirt track!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: R-right! Let's get started, Trainer! ♪
choice_data_list: Let's start with the dirt track!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Uh, and what is that supposed to mean?! Are you
implying that I don't normally listen to you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! I-I was just, uh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Keep up the good work, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! See what you did?! I'm all flustered because
of you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not fine! Hmph! Now you need to make up
for what you've done.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hurry up and make a training program that makes
use of Air Groove's notes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her seemingly foul mood, Daiwa Scarlet
gives everything she has in the ensuing training.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What?! Just like that?! Didn't you just say we're going to discuss the training regimen?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're always like this! Randomly deciding things
for me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And today, you interrupted me right when I was in
the middle of talking with Air―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! I-I was just, uh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Keep up the good work, Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ugh! This is your fault for making me mad!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: And right in front of Air Groove too!
choice_data_list: There's the Daiwa Scarlet I'm used to.
There's the Daiwa Scarlet I'm used to.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
At least say you're sorry! Geez, this is exactly
what I mean...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her seemingly foul mood, Daiwa Scarlet
gives everything she has in the ensuing training.
